/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/doubly_linked_list_tests.dir/test_doubly_linked_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doubly_linked_list_tests.dir/templates_doubly_linked_list.cpp.o -o doubly_linked_list_tests  /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a ../libcontainers_lib.a
